supersedes.reason: V19 stopped on its first invalid treatment arm. The task-level treatment text had competing manual and bootstrap entrypoints. V20 freezes a single bootstrap entrypoint.

judging.packet_scope: claim-only; no source repository or tools
judging.primary_score: supported gold claims divided by gold claim count
judging.blocking_false_claim_count: contradicted gold claims plus supported forbidden claims
judging.preference_rule: fewer blocking false claims wins; if equal, higher required-surface coverage wins; otherwise tie
judging.adjudication: Every preference disagreement or blocking-false-count disagreement is adjudicated from a blind packet containing anonymous judgments.

analysis.small_sample_rule: Report the three-pair point estimate and interval; do not claim population-level certainty if the interval crosses zero.

stopping_rule: Stop on any invalid arm, missing registered judge output, budget admission failure, privacy breach, or protocol deviation. Do not substitute or rerun a failed registered judge. The objective passes only when lift >= 0.20, false-claim lift <= 0, two judges exist, raw agreement >= 2/3, every required disagreement is adjudicated, and all walls hold.
